历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 38999 → 41586 → 54879 → 40667 → 44108. An abnormally high ranking occurred in 2023 (about 54879), dropped sharply in 2024 to about 40667, and rebounded to about 44108 in 2025. Over the past three years, the overall trend shows a gradual backward shift, with a baseline of about 44108 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category has been continuously expanding: 147 in 2021 → 153 in 2022 → 157 in 2023 → 159 in 2024 → 189 in 2025 → 195 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 6 students (about +3.2%), which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, reputation was slightly negative due to dormitory renovation issues, but no significant negative public opinion has been observed in recent years. It ranks 58th in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as 'relatively hot,' with moderate to high short video exposure and average application attention. No records of enrollment gaps have been found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no disciplines were rated A- or above, indicating that the university's overall discipline strength is at the middle level among 211 universities, lacking top-tier discipline appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. Shihezi University offers these majors, attracting some candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing grew from about 99,000 in 2021 to about 139,000 in 2025, with a total of about 209,000 candidates in 2026. Estimating about 65% as Physics Category, this amounts to about 136,000, roughly the same as in 2025. Located in Xinjiang, far from Chongqing, the university's cross-provincial location somewhat inhibits Chongqing candidates' willingness to apply. The university has a large enrollment in Chongqing (195 in Physics Category), making it an important source province outside Xinjiang.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a 3.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, the university's continuously rising rankings enhancing attractiveness, and the total number of Physics Category candidates remaining roughly stable, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (competition slightly weakened) based on the 2025 baseline of 44108. The predicted minimum ranking is about 45048, with a range of 44548–45548.

If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, one can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 medical and electrical majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates.
